name: feature-gallery-media-20260404-0010
idea: Feature: Gallery media selection for timeline agent context. Extend the media selection pattern used on the timeline to also work in the generation gallery pane and gallery view. Users should be able to: 1) Single-click to select one item, 2) Cmd+click to select multiple items individually, 3) Selected items should be visually highlighted similar to timeline selection, 4) Selected gallery items should appear in the agent chat panel as context (same 'attaching N images' indicator), 5) Selected gallery items should be sent alongside tasks to the timeline agent, same as timeline selections. Key design goal: generalize the selection system so it works for both timeline clips and gallery items. The selection hook/context should be shared or at least use a common interface. Gallery selection applies to images and videos only (not effects, not music). The existing useSelectedMediaClips hook returns clip-based data — we need to either extend it or create a parallel hook for gallery items that produces the same output shape. The agent chat and task submission already accept attachments — we need to feed gallery selections into the same pipeline.

overrides.note: User answers: Q1: Additive — both timeline and gallery selections contribute to attachments. Q2: Double-click still opens lightbox. Single click selects. Q3: Only in GenerationsPane within editor for now. Q4: Shift+click to toggle individual items one at a time (not range select). Also support lasso/marquee drag-to-select multiple items. Additionally: selected gallery items (whether selected via lasso, shift+click, or single click) should be draggable onto the video editor timeline. When multiple items are selected, dragging them should drag all selected items together onto the timeline.
